bead.title: build(feat-009): Cypher executor — StorageAdapter backend (SQLite)
bead.description:
Adapt the Cypher executor to run against axon-storage::StorageAdapter. Implement QueryStore (from the executor bead) using StorageAdapter's get/range_scan/index_lookup/links primitives.

This is the production execution path. SQLite backend at minimum; PostgreSQL should pass the same tests since the StorageAdapter trait is uniform.

Performance gates per ADR-021/FEAT-009: DDx ready/blocked at 1k beads <100ms p99, at 10k beads <500ms p99.

No backend-specific operators per ADR-010 §No Backend-Specific Query Operators.
bead.acceptance: AC1. QueryStore has an axon-storage-backed implementation. AC2. The 10+ integration tests from the executor bead pass against the SQLite backend. AC3. DDx ready/blocked benchmark: <100ms p99 at 1k beads on dev hardware. AC4. cargo test --workspace passes; cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings clean. AC5. No backend-specific operators (per ADR-010).
